metadata.title: Latex Suite
metadata.description: Make typesetting LaTeX math as fast as handwriting through snippets, text expansion, and editor enhancements

regex.source: .setText("Make equations more readable by hiding LaTeX markup and instead displaying it in a pretty format.")
regex.target: .setText("通过隐藏 LaTeX 标记并以美观的格式显示，使公式更易于阅读")

regex.source: .setText("LaTeX beneath the cursor will be revealed.")
regex.target: .setText("光标下的LaTeX将被显示")

regex.source: .setText("Disabled by default to not confuse new users. However, I recommend turning this on once you are comfortable with the plugin!")
regex.target: .setText("默认情况下禁用，以免困扰新用户。不过，我建议一旦您熟悉了这个插件，就开启这个功能！")

regex.source: .setText("When inside an equation, show a popup preview window of the rendered math.")
regex.target: .setText("在方程内部时，显示渲染后的数学的弹出式预览窗口。")

regex.source: .setText("The popup preview will be shown for all inline math equations, as well as for block math equations in Source mode.")
regex.target: .setText("弹出预览将显示所有内联数学方程，以及在源代码模式下的块数学方程")

regex.source: .setButtonText("Reset to default snippets")
regex.target: .setButtonText("将代码片段重设为默认值")

regex.source: .setButtonText("Remove all snippets")
regex.target: .setButtonText("移除所有的代码片段")

regex.source: .setButtonText("Cancel")
regex.target: .setButtonText("取消")

regex.source: .setName("Enabled")
regex.target: .setName("开启")

regex.source: .setName("Snippets")
regex.target: .setName("代码片段")

regex.source: .setName("Load snippets from file or folder")
regex.target: .setName("从文件或文件夹中加载代码片段")

regex.source: .setName("Snippets file or folder location")
regex.target: .setName("代码片段文件或文件夹位置")

regex.source: .setName("Key trigger for non-auto snippets")
regex.target: .setName("非自动代码片段的触发按键")

regex.source: .setName("Color paired brackets")
regex.target: .setName("彩色配对括号")

regex.source: .setName("Highlight matching bracket beneath cursor")
regex.target: .setName("高亮光标下的配对括号")

regex.source: .setName("Position")
regex.target: .setName("显示位置")

regex.source: .setName("Fraction symbol")
regex.target: .setName("分数符号")

regex.source: .setName("Excluded environments")
regex.target: .setName("排除的环境")

regex.source: .setName("Breaking characters")
regex.target: .setName("打断符号")

regex.source: .setName("Environments")
regex.target: .setName("环境")

regex.source: .setName("Triggers")
regex.target: .setName("触发符号")

regex.source: .setName("Snippet variables")
regex.target: .setName("代码片段变量")

regex.source: .setName("Load snippet variables from file or folder")
regex.target: .setName("从文件或文件夹中加载代码片段变量")

regex.source: .setName("Snippet variables file or folder location")
regex.target: .setName("代码片段变量文件或文件夹的位置")

regex.source: .setName("Word delimiters")
regex.target: .setName("单词分隔符")

regex.source: .setName("Remove trailing whitespaces in snippets in inline math")
regex.target: .setName("在内联数学公式中的片段移除尾随空格")

regex.source: .setName("Remove closing $ when backspacing inside blank inline math")
regex.target: .setName("在内联数学公式的空白处退格时移除闭合的 $")

regex.source: .setName("Don't trigger snippets when IME is active")
regex.target: .setName("当输入法编辑器（IME）处于活动状态时不触发片段")

regex.source: .setName("Code languages to interpret as math mode")
regex.target: .setName("将以下代码语言解释为数学模式")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether snippets are enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否开启代码片段功能")

regex.source: .setDesc('Enter snippets here.  Remember to add a comma after each snippet, and escape all backslashes with an extra \\. Lines starting with "//" will be treated as comments and ignored.')
regex.target: .setDesc('在此输入代码片段。记得在每个片段后添加逗号，并用额外的反斜杠转义所有 \\。 以 "//" 开始的行将会被视为注释而被忽略')

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to load snippets from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否从一个指定的文件加载代码片段，或者从一个文件夹中的所有文件加载代码片段（而不是从插件设置中加载）")

regex.source: .setDesc("What key to press to expand non-auto snippets.")
regex.target: .setDesc("按下哪个键来触发扩展非自动代码片段")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to colorize matching brackets.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否以彩色显示配对括号")

regex.source: .setDesc("When the cursor is adjacent to a bracket, highlight the matching bracket.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当光标紧邻一个括号时，高亮显示配对的括号")

regex.source: .setDesc("Where to display the popup preview relative to the equation source.")
regex.target: .setDesc("显示相对于数学公式源码的弹出预览位置")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether auto-fraction is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否启用自动分数功能（auto-fraction）.")

regex.source: .setDesc("The fraction symbol to use in the replacement. e.g. \\frac, \\dfrac, \\tfrac")
regex.target: .setDesc("在替换操作时使用的分数符号  例如 \\frac, \\dfrac, \\tfrac")

regex.source: .setDesc('A list of environments to exclude auto-fraction from running in. For example, to exclude auto-fraction from running while inside an exponent, such as e^{...}, use  ["^{", "}"]')
regex.target: .setDesc('一个不运行自动分数功能的环境列表。例如，在指数内不运行自动分数，例如 e^{...}，使用  ["^{", "}"]')

regex.source: .setDesc('A list of characters that denote the start/end of a fraction. e.g. if + is included in the list, "a+b/c" will expand to "a+\\frac{b}{c}". If + is not in the list, it will expand to "\\frac{a+b}{c}".')
regex.target: .setDesc('表示分数开始/结束的字符列表。例如：如果 + 在此列表中，"a+b/c" 将会扩展为 "a+\\frac{b}{c}"；如果 + 不在此列表中，则扩展为 "\\frac{a+b}{c}"')

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether matrix shortcuts are enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否启用矩阵快捷方式")

regex.source: .setDesc("A list of environment names to run the matrix shortcuts in, separated by commas.")
regex.target: .setDesc("一个环境名称列表，用逗号分隔，在这些环境中快捷运行矩阵")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether tabout is enabled.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否启用制表符对齐功能")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to automatically enlarge brackets containing e.g. sum, int, frac.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否自动放大包含sum、int、frac等的括号")

regex.source: .setDesc("A list of symbols that should trigger auto-enlarge brackets, separated by commas.")
regex.target: .setDesc("一个符号列表，用逗号分隔，这些符号应该触发自动放大括号")

regex.source: .setDesc("Assign snippet variables that can be used as shortcuts when writing snippets.")
regex.target: .setDesc("分配代码片段变量，这些变量在编写片段时可以用作快捷方式")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to load snippet variables from a specified file, or from all files within a folder (instead of from the plugin settings).")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否从某指定的文件加载代码片段变量，或者从某文件夹中的所有文件加载代码片段变量（而不是从插件设置中加载）")

regex.source: .setDesc('Symbols that will be treated as word delimiters, for use with the "w" snippet option.')
regex.target: .setDesc('将被视为单词分隔符的符号，用于与“w”片段选项一起使用')

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to remove trailing whitespaces when expanding snippets at the end of inline math blocks.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在展开内联数学块末尾的片段时是否移除尾随空格")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to also remove the closing $ when you delete the opening $ symbol inside blank inline math.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当您在空白内联数学中删除不闭合的 $ 时，是否也移除闭合的 $")

regex.source: .setDesc("Whether to suppress snippets triggering when an IME is active.")
regex.target: .setDesc("是否在输入法编辑器（IME）处于活动状态时禁止触发片段")

regex.source: .setDesc("Codeblock languages where the whole code block should be treated like a math block, separated by commas.")
regex.target: .setDesc("代码块语言，整个代码块应被视为数学块，用逗号分隔")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder('[ ["^{", "}] ]')
regex.target: .setPlaceholder('[ ["^{", "}] ]')

regex.source: .setTooltip("Reset to default snippets")
regex.target: .setTooltip("将代码片段重设为默认值")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Remove all snippets")
regex.target: .setTooltip("移除所有的代码片段")
